verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence first; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord. Move codes to expired only when expiry evidence is strong.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML identifies Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, dateModified 06/16/2026, max level 20000, and directly lists NEW CODES: KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW. It does not expose rewards, per-code level requirements, or expiry proof for older codes.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML identifies the official Sailor Piece Discord server, but channel messages such as code-list are not exposed in public HTML, so it is not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board JSON
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Board name is Sailor Piece and dateLastActivity is 2026-06-12T02:16:43.308Z, but the JSON does not contain KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, or the June 9 code strings. Not used as decisive current code proof.

sources.name: Pocket Tactics Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated Jun 15, 2026 in accessible markup. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW plus the retained June/May reward-family codes active. It also places SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG in expired context, creating a conflict.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 15, 2026. Active list has 10 codes: RAIDUPDATENOW, KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It marks 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE, 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM, FREECODEFORYALLL2, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG inactive.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 15, 2026. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, 1MIL200KLIKESWOWW, FREECODEFORYALLL3, and BIGDELAYSSORRYCODE as active with exact rewards. It lists many older retained codes expired, so it is direct support for the new codes and conflict context for older retained codes.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Accessible structured content dateModified 2026-06-15T14:41:07+00:00. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED level 12,500 and RAIDUPDATENOW level 9,000, then SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS active. It lists the June 9 codes, 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG expired.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Published and updated June 15, 2026. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW active with rewards, and keeps SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2/3, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS active. It lists the June 9 additions and 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2 expired, creating conflicts.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated Jun 15, 2026 in accessible markup. Lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED, RAIDUPDATENOW, the June 9 codes, 1BIL/FREECODEFORYALLL2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3/2, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and FREECODEFORYALL active. Its new-code reward text conflicts with Beebom, Pro Game Guides, Pocket Tactics, and Destructoid. It lists SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS expired.

sources.name: U7BUY Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: June 15, 2026 page says the newest codes were compiled from official Discord announcements and manually verified. It lists all 16 retained active codes plus several old/new-server-only codes that remain expired in our data because they conflict with stronger established expired context and no direct official message was accessible.

sources.name: Sailor Piece Wiki / Fandom Codes
sources.notes: Direct curl returned 403 after clearing local proxy variables, so it was not used as decisive June 16 proof.

decisions.reason: Official Roblox game page dateModified 06/16/2026 still directly lists KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW under NEW CODES. Multiple current third-party sources also list them active.

GamesRadar updated current code table explicitly lists RAIDUPDATENOW as requiring level 9,000. The previous 7,500 value was an inferred RAIDS-style reward-family gate, so the explicit current source wins for Level Eligibility Filter accuracy.
Official Roblox lists it under NEW CODES and GamesRadar explicitly lists its level requirement as 12,500. Rewards remain supported by Beebom, Pro Game Guides, Pocket Tactics, and Destructoid.
Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, Beebom, and U7BUY still list these active/current, while Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them inactive/expired. No official expiry proof was accessible.
Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, and U7BUY still list these active/current, while Beebom, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them expired/inactive. No official expiry proof was accessible.

PCGamesN, Destructoid, and U7BUY list it active/current, while Pocket Tactics, GamesRadar, Pro Game Guides, and Beebom list it expired/inactive. Kept active because current active evidence remains and no accessible official expiry proof was found.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Pocket Tactics, and U7BUY still support much of this set as active/current, while Beebom or PCGamesN conflict for parts of it. No accessible official expiry proof was found.

U7BUY lists several previously expired codes as active/new-server-only, but this conflicts with multiple established current pages and no direct official Discord message was accessible. Did not reactivate without stronger proof.
No active code had official or strong enough cross-source expiry evidence to move today. Existing conflicts were retained in notes and source_conflicts.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN reward text for KINGUPDATEHASARRIVED and RAIDUPDATENOW conflicts with Beebom, Pro Game Guides, Pocket Tactics, and Destructoid. The majority reward bundle was retained.
source_conflicts.next_step: Update rewards only if official Discord/Trello/in-game proof or stronger current-source agreement contradicts the majority bundle.

source_conflicts.conflict: Yesterday's 7,500 level was inferred from the RAIDS reward family. GamesRadar now explicitly lists RAIDUPDATENOW as requiring level 9,000, so the explicit current source was used.
source_conflicts.next_step: Replace only if official, in-game, or stronger current explicit per-code level evidence contradicts 9,000.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, Beebom, and U7BUY list these active/current; Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them inactive/expired.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official evidence appears or current-source expiry agreement becomes stronger than active evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pocket Tactics, PCGamesN, and U7BUY list these active/current; Beebom, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official expiry proof or stronger current expiry agreement appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN, Destructoid, and U7BUY list it active/current; Pocket Tactics, GamesRadar, Pro Game Guides, and Beebom list it expired/inactive.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or stronger current sources join explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Pocket Tactics, and U7BUY support active status for much of this set; Beebom or PCGamesN conflict for parts of the set.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not move based on one or two conflicting sources without official or broader current expiry proof.

source_conflicts.conflict: U7BUY lists 700KFAVSTY, FREECODEHERE1, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1/2, visit/follow codes and similar old codes as active/new-server-only, while multiple established current sources treat them as expired and direct official proof was not accessible.
source_conflicts.next_step: Reactivate only with direct official/in-game evidence or broad current agreement.
